# <img src="https://cdn.wago.io/thumbnails/5MMvxRkfl5IEs0Ln0ChGHpn79qJJ7m7MimNvYFX3.png" alt="Widget Tools Logo" width="40" height="40" align="top"> Widget Tools

[![GitHub Sponsor](https://img.shields.io/static/v1?label=GitHub&nbsp;Sponsor&message=%E2%9D%A4&color=EA4AAA&style=for-the-badge&logo=GitHub)](https://github.com/sponsors/Arxareon)
[![PayPal Donation](https://img.shields.io/static/v1?label=PayPal&nbsp;Donation&message=%E2%9D%A4&&color=0F9CD8&style=for-the-badge&logo=data:image/svg+xml;base64,)](https://www.paypal.com/donate/?hosted_button_id=Z4FSAFKA5LX98)

*This addon is providing a development toolset as a foundation for other addons mainly focused on utilities, settings and UI widget management.*

### **Features**

 - **Lite mode:** disable any settings UI for any addon built with Widget Tools.
 - Advanced settings data and UI management via the provided Lua libraries.
 - Several coding utilities, shared addon resources (e.g. fonts), debugging tools & more.
 - Includes multi-version support for the modern game and all versions of Classic!

### Support

Alongside the one-time & monthly donation options featured above, watching ads when downloading my addons on [**CurseForge**](https://www.curseforge.com/members/arxareon/projects) or [**Wago**](https://addons.wago.io/user/Arxareon) also supports my work. You can keep them up to date via the CurseForge or Wago App *as well as **[WoWUP](https://wowup.io/)** if you enable CurseForge or Wago.io as an addon provider*.

#### *Thank you for your continued support,*
Celierra
